title: Pass Through Vanity Fair
description: The fair sells a shinier self. Refuse its bargains, bear witness, and find Hopeful.
description_zh: 市集贩卖更闪亮的自我。拒绝它的交易，作见证，并找到盼望。

steps.description: Meet the companion whose hope rises in the crowd.
steps.description_zh: 在人群中遇见那位盼望渐起的同伴。

steps.description: Leave by the far gate without selling peace for applause.
steps.description_zh: 从远门离开，不把平安卖给掌声。
